home.sloganHero: Mit der Magie des Codes zu Endlosen Lösungen

about.p1: It all began in 1998 when founder Fatih SEZER typed the cat command into the embedded software of an Amstrad CPC 6128 — a machine with only a monitor and keyboard. Between 2001 and 2004, amid costly hardware inventory in Turkey, electronics grew through motherboard and power-supply repair; from 2004 to 2008, assembly, electronics software and database programming led Fatih SEZER to create the free Sanas platform that gathered on the web.
about.p2: Packaged software built by a free-standing, global team was gathered under a single source, decoupled from the original developer and handed to a dedicated support team. With a continuously advancing team, dual-cycle development and elevated security, the technological platform matured into unique commercial system structures.
about.p3: As work advanced, the company took the name Sanas Technology Company. Beyond mechatronics integrity, foundational growth in electronics software, economics, logistics and healthcare shaped its corporate vision. Its mission: develop, create and control commercial systems — and move them into a new interdisciplinary structure with products, systems and services grounded in academic counterparts.
about.p4: With more than fifteen years of global software development, electronics design, high-marginal-utility economic models, advanced logistics coordination and the integration of social and healthcare academic perspectives, Sanas Technology is honoured to serve its valued clients.

projects.p1Desc: School resource management — enrollment, auth and mobile client for students, parents, teachers and staff.
projects.p1Tech: Flutter, Go, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, Firebase
projects.p2Desc: AI assistant for doctors — mobile, web and desktop. From epicrisis drafting to clinical flow.
projects.p3Desc: International cancer labelling research. AlloyDB-backed statistics that digitize written tests.
projects.p4Desc: QR-card web game platform — interactive games for corporate and individual play.
projects.p4Tech: ASP.NET MVC, SignalR, SQL Server, Firebase
projects.p5Desc: AI-assisted food ordering — a mobile experience with a fixed infrastructure fee model.
projects.p6Desc: Mechatronic hologram project — a large AI-powered speaking holographic system.
projects.p7Desc: AI messaging for couples only — WhatsApp and Instagram in one private space.
projects.p8Desc: Personal health and life tracking — on-device data, reports and widgets.

solutions.dom1Extra: Marginal utility and real operations in one discipline — formulas proven in the field.
solutions.dom2Extra: Trust, verification and traffic analysis with advanced connectivity.
solutions.dom3Extra: Systems that refuse downtime in clinical and administrative flows.
solutions.dom4Extra: Recommendation, automation and decision support live inside the product.
solutions.dom5Extra: Electrical, electronics and software in a shared set.
solutions.dom6Extra: Observable, scalable delivery in the cloud.

team.p1: The Sanas tree grows from one root: software, economics, intelligence, logistics and healthcare under one engineering discipline. A core team from around the world gathers products under a single source and carries them live.
team.p2: Für betriebliche oder persönliche Softwareunterstützung erreichen Sie uns auch über İstiklal Yazılım — ein Unternehmen von Sanas Technology.
